title: astragalus varius
intro: Astragalus varius, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus varius include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
